message:
feat(tui): wire full layout and widgets into ftui view() (bd-g0yw)

Replace the 3-line view() stub with a complete responsive layout that
renders all widgets: SearchInput, ProcessTable, ProcessDetail, StatusBar,
HelpOverlay, ConfirmDialog, and NotificationStack.

Add render_view() methods to SearchInput, ConfirmDialog, and ProcessTable
that accept immutable state references, solving the Elm architecture
constraint where view(&self) cannot provide &mut State to widgets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
